layers: [2026-03-02 00:28] At 00:23 on March 2, a user greeted the bot and inquired whether it was still operational. The bot replied affirmatively, confirmed that everything was running smoothly, thanked the user for the check‑in, and offered further assistance.

[2026-03-02 00:28] On March 2, 2026, Username sent a series of short messages asking whether Botname was still functioning. In each reply, Botname confirmed it was fully operational, calmly assuring the user of its readiness and offering further assistance. The exchange repeated the same test prompt and reassuring response until the bot invited the user to request help.
